# Alpha Court

> AI agents debate crypto tokens using on-chain data from Nansen. Three AI analysts — Bull, Bear, and Judge — argue whether to buy a token in real-time, each citing different on-chain signals. Pay per trial via the x402 protocol — no API keys or subscriptions, just USDC micropayments on Base.

## API Endpoints

- [POST /api/trial](/api-docs): Create a debate trial for a token ($1.00 USDC via x402)
- [GET /api/debate/{trialId}](/api-docs): Stream the live debate via Server-Sent Events (free)
- [GET /api/verdict/{trialId}](/api-docs): Get the final verdict JSON (free)
- [GET /api/trials](/api-docs): List recent completed trials (free)
- [GET /api/token/search](/api-docs): Search tokens by name, symbol, or address (free)

## Agent Integration

- [API Documentation](/api-docs): Full endpoint docs with request/response examples and SSE event schemas
- [Machine-Readable Discovery](/.well-known/x402): JSON document with all endpoints, pricing, and x402 payment configuration
- [x402 Protocol](https://x402.org): Payment protocol specification

## Trading Integration

When the verdict is BUY or SELL (Solana and Base chains only), the `/api/verdict/{trialId}` response includes a `trade` object with a ready-to-use `nansen trade quote` command. Agents with the Nansen CLI can go from analysis to execution:

1. Get verdict: `GET /api/verdict/{trialId}` -> `{ ..., trade: { action: "buy", command: "nansen trade quote --chain solana --from USDC --to <address> --amount 50 --amount-unit usd" } }`
2. Execute quote: `nansen trade execute --quote <quoteId>`

Requires: `nansen-cli` (npm i -g nansen-cli), a Nansen wallet, and USDC + gas on the target chain.

## Optional

- [Full API Details](/llms-full.txt): Complete API reference with all request/response formats and SSE event types
